RecipientBusinessName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: ST THOMAS CATHOLIC CHURCH - RESPECT FOR LIFE

DissolutionInformationGrp.ShortExplanationTxt: 3,790.894 SHS BNY MELLON S/C MULTI-STRATEGY FUND
2,730.798 SHS DFA ENERG MKTS CORE EQUITY
50 SHS ATLASSIAN CORP PLC CLASS A

LiquidationExplanationStmt.ExplanationTxt: DECAMS FOUNDATION INC ADOPTED A PLAN OF DISSOLUTION ON SEPTEMBER 4, 2018 PURSUANT TO THE STATE OF FLORIDA STATUTES. THE ASSETS OF DECAMS HAVE BEEN TRANSFERRED TO THE BANK NEW YORK (BNY) MELLON CHARITABLE GIFT FUND (EIN 30-0748315). THE GIFT FUND ALLOWS THE DEGENNARO FAMILY AND ITS MEMBERS TO ESTABLISH A DONOR ADVISED ACCOUNT FOR ADMINISTRATIVE CONVENIENCE AND TO MANAGE CHARIRABLE DONATIONS ON BEHALF OF THE FAMILY.

OtherDecreasesDetail.Desc: TRANSFER TO THE BANK NEW YORK MELLON CHARITABLE GIFT FUND AT BOOK VALUE
